message:
chore: regenerate conformance artifacts and expand AD gradient coverage

Re-run conformance suite producing updated proof/scrub/sidecar artifacts
across all 340 tracked files. Adds gradient test cases for rsqrt, abs,
logistic, expm1, log1p, asin, and acos primitives, plus vmap cases for
neg, exp, square, abs, and tanh. Fixes square_plus_linear expected
values (x^2 + 2x, grad = 2x + 2).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
